title: podman build --file does not actually accept a URL
body:
### Issue Description

> --file, -f=Containerfile  
> Specifies a Containerfile which contains instructions for building the image, either a local file **or an http or https URL**. If more than one Containerfile is specified, FROM instructions are only be accepted from the last specified file.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

```
$ podman build --file=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/containers/buildah/main/tests/bud/base-with-arg/Containerfile .
```

### Describe the results you received

```
Error: stat /var/tmp/libpod_builder598674354/build/https:/raw.githubusercontent.com/containers/buildah/main/tests/bud/base-with-arg/Containerfile: no such file or directory
```

### Describe the results you expected

The Containerfile is pulled from the web and used.
